summary: Permanent life-force tether requiring conscious consent and mutual vulnerability from both parties; ritual creates equal power exchange that mirrors emotional equality themes while constraining narrative options through shared fate
evidence_scope: Volume 8: Soul-bond ritual linking protagonist and protector; Volume 11: Death-bond sensation during companion crisis

summary: Allies repeatedly challenge protagonist identity through confrontation; each exchange reveals different aspect of transmigrator ambiguity, divine vessel prophecy, or unknown parentage without resolving underlying mystery
evidence_scope: Volume 7: Mentor interrogation using cross-dimensional evidence; Volume 10: Prophecy revelation triggering identity crisis; Volume 11: Faction-leader exposition of prophesied status

summary: Antagonist declares protection for same figure they threaten or suspect; creates unresolved moral tension where factional identity and personal stake compete without narrative explanation
evidence_scope: Volume 7: Dark faction leader reveals intimate knowledge while positioning as guardian; Volume 10: Forced alliance formed among captors with conflicting protective declarations
